warnings.message: Live simulation failed (2/3); previous predictions_live.json retained. Last stderr:  here would silently push the wrong team through the rest of the simulated bracket. Likely causes: the sim's group/third-place tiebreaker resolved differently than the provider's official standings, a stale or mis-keyed record in data/live/results_2026.json, or a provider team-name alias missing from fetch_results.TEAM_ALIAS. Refusing to continue — fix the upstream data. (Fail-loud is intentional: the CI circuit breaker absorbs repeated failures; a warning would let a corrupted bracket publish.)
